text: I asked “Aisha, *How is the prayer of Allah's Messenger () during the month of Ramadan.” She said, "Allah's Messenger (&) never exceeded eleven rakat in Ramadan or in other months; he used to offer four rakiat- do ot ask me about their beauty and length, then four rakat, do not ask me about their beauty and length, and then three rakat.* Aisha further said, 'l said, 'O Allah's Messenger (&)! Do you sleep before offering the witr prayer?' He replied, 'O “Aishal My eyes sleep but my heart remains awake'l" [ . : Sahih al-Bukhari 1147
